title: T-015 — UI: RPT-HOME Dashboard Catalog (/reporting) — search + filter + freshness + P2 gating (12-REPORTING §15.2)
prompt:
# T-015 — RPT-HOME Dashboard Catalog UI

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §15.2 RPT-HOME, §9.3 dashboards_catalog, D-RPT-10 feature flag rollout, §13.1 dashboard layout standards
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/dashboard.jsx:3-112 (`rpt_home_dashboard_catalog`)
UX: prototypes/design/12-REPORTING-UX.md:188-222

## Goal
Server Component page `/reporting` rendering the dashboard catalog from `dashboards_catalog` table (T-008) with search input, domain/phase facet filters, freshness badges driven by mv_refresh_log, and P2 gating via reporting.v2_dashboards feature flag. P2 cards trigger RPT-019 p2_toast_modal when flag OFF. Matches prototype 1:1 with shadcn primitives.

## Prototype parity
- Source of truth: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/dashboard.jsx:3-112` (`rpt_home_dashboard_catalog`)
- UX line: `prototypes/design/12-REPORTING-UX.md:188-222`
- Translation: hardcoded RPT_CATALOG → Drizzle query against dashboards_catalog (T-008); client-side filter state → URL searchParams via nuqs; staleCount → server-computed from mv_refresh_log; WeekSelector → shadcn Calendar+Popover; rpt-cat-grid → Tailwind grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4; rpt-cat-card → shadcn Card; P2 card click → server-side flag eval (if ON render real, if OFF render disabled-with-tooltip) per D-RPT-10.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/(reporting)/page.tsx` (RSC) — calls `getDashboardsCatalog(orgId)` from T-008; passes data to client component.
2. `apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/catalog-client.tsx` ('use client') — search + domain + phase filters via nuqs URL state; renders shadcn Card grid; P2 cards Disabled when flag OFF (Tooltip explaining P2 timeline) — never open p2_toast_modal unless user explicitly clicks the disabled tile.
3. `apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/freshness-badge.tsx` — reads mv_refresh_log via server fetch; shows last_refresh + 'fresh' / 'stale' badge per V-RPT-REFRESH-4 (>15 min threshold).
4. All visible strings via next-intl `reporting.home.*` keys (translation-notes red line).
5. Empty / loading / error / permission states all implemented (UI parity policy).
6. RTL test asserts parity vs prototype line range + facet filters + flag-gating + four states.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/catalog-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/freshness-badge.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/__tests__/catalog-client.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/messages/en/reporting-home.json [create]
- apps/web/messages/pl/reporting-home.json [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/dashboard.jsx:3-112`, then it has the same Card grid + facet filter chips + search input + freshness badge + week selector — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist.
2. Given dashboards_catalog has 10 P1 + 15 P2 rows and `reporting.v2_dashboards` flag is OFF for the org, when the page renders, then 10 P1 cards are interactive and 15 P2 cards are disabled with Tooltip; no p2_toast_modal opens until user clicks the disabled tile.
3. Given URL searchParams `?q=yield&domain=production`, when the page renders, then only matching cards display; URL state survives reload.
4. Given mv_refresh_log shows last_refresh > 15 min ago for `mv_yield_by_line_week`, when the freshness badge for the Yield by Line card renders, then it shows 'Data stale' indicator per V-RPT-REFRESH-4.
5. Given a user without `rpt.dashboard.view` permission hits /reporting, when middleware (T-009) runs, then they receive 403 + audit row before the page renders.
6. Given UI parity policy, when closeout is reviewed, then screenshot + Playwright trace attached; empty / loading / error / permission states covered in tests.
7. Hardcoded labels are all routed through next-intl `reporting.home.*` keys; no English strings hard-baked in JSX.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: RTL test asserting parity (cards + filters + freshness + flag-gating + 4 states) + URL state survival + permission-deny path.
- Playwright spec for visual parity vs prototype HTML render (use prototype HTML from `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/reporting.html` as snapshot source if available).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web test catalog-client && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web playwright test reporting-home`.
- GREEN: build RSC page + client component + freshness badge + next-intl messages.

## Risk red lines
- Do not query dashboards_catalog from client component — always Server Component query (avoids leaking flag eval to client).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to shadcn Card + Tailwind grid per translation-notes.
- Do not skip next-intl wrapping — translation-notes red line for module.
- Do not show P2 cards as enabled when flag is OFF — D-RPT-10 mandates flag-gated UI.
- Do not let staleCount be client-computed — server reads mv_refresh_log.
- Do not let URL state diverge from server-rendered initial state (nuqs SSR pattern required).
- Do not skip the four states (empty / loading / error / permission) — UI parity policy mandate.

pipeline_inputs.description: RPT-HOME catalog page (RSC + nuqs URL state) with search/filter/freshness/flag-gating, matching rpt_home_dashboard_catalog prototype 1:1.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component reads dashboards_catalog (T-008) + mv_refresh_log; client renders cards with shadcn primitives; flag-gated P2 cards disabled (no modal until clicked); next-intl keys; four states; Playwright parity.
out_of_scope: Do not implement individual dashboard pages (T-016..T-023)

Given URL searchParams ?q=yield&domain=production, when the page renders, then only matching cards display; URL state survives reload
